self_improvement.claim: Directive Workspace can improve whole-product truth quality by treating descriptive label-style transformation references as notes instead of broken artifact links.
self_improvement.mechanism: This DEEP Architecture case materializes label-link normalization inside the shared state resolver.
self_improvement.baseline_observation: Before this DEEP opener, the two remaining label-style historical transformation records still resolved as broken because the resolver treated descriptive `this record (...)` values as linked artifact paths.
self_improvement.expected_effect: Historical Runtime transformation inspection remains explicit, bounded, and read-only while the final descriptive label-style failures are removed.

decision.rationale: The canonical truth anchor should normalize descriptive label-style transformation references into note fields instead of broken links.
decision.runtime_threshold_check: yes - the mechanism is still valuable without a runtime surface, so Architecture should retain product-owned value
